youtube.description:
SALUTATIONS FELLAS!

We’re just two guys who love making videos, we love playing games like Gmod, Minecraft and whatever we feel like posting, we try and have very authentic early let’s play feeling YouTube videos inspired by Venturiantale’s videos and all sorts of other YouTubers who shaped and made us into the people we are. we grew up on that stuff and miss it so we’re making it ourselves 

Subscribe and join us as we make our way through all sorts of journeys
